title: He Gained 2 Million Followers in 90 Minutes..👷🏻

transcript.text: This is absolutely unreal. Imagine gaining 2 million followers and becoming a national hero in 95 minutes because that is exactly what 40-year-old goalkeeper Vozinha just did. The number two powerhouse ranked Spain took 27 shots, seven of which were on goal against a 64th ranked Cabo Verde playing in their first World Cup ever. All of which were saved by the 40-year-old keeper Vozinha. When the game started, Vozinha had 50,000 followers on Instagram. This man did not check his phone for 95 minutes and he came back to more than 2 million followers. If you're not Vozinha, but you still [music] want to grow to 2 million followers on Instagram, try vidIQ. It searches through millions of reels on Instagram to find what is actually trending in a matter of seconds so you can make viral content, too. It will also analyze your content and based on real Instagram data, it will tell you exactly what you're doing right and what you're doing wrong.
